documents.label: The minor's birth certificate
A copy of your birth certificate
A court order
Foster care certification
A copy of your driver's license or other government-issued identification
A lawfully executed and valid power of attorney
A copy of the minor's Social Security card
A copy of your Social Security card

authority.notes: Listed under 'To show you are the minor's parent or authorized representative'. Any one of these is sufficient.

parentId.notes: Listed under 'For proof of your identity' with 'provide one from each category' — the bullets within this sub-category are OR options.

address.notes: No separate proof-of-address document is listed. The form collects the guardian's current address as a field but does not require a supporting document.

childId.notes: The form explicitly says 'For the minor, please provide BOTH of the following', requiring both the minor's Social Security card and birth certificate.

documents.label: Child's birth certificate
Proof of guardianship, if not named on child's birth certificate
Driver's license or another government issued identification card (e.g. state ID card)
Child's Social Security card
Proof of address (bank statement, utility bill, or insurance statement)

authority.notes: The child's birth certificate satisfies authority if the parent is named on it. A separate proof of guardianship is required only if the parent is NOT named on the birth certificate — so these two are conditional alternatives, not both required simultaneously. Modeled as 'or' since one of the two will always suffice.

childId.notes: The page explicitly lists both 'a copy of your child's birth certificate' and 'a copy of your child's Social Security card' as separate required items in the 'all of the following' list, making both required for child identity verification.

documents.label: A document issued by a Federal, State, or local government agency showing proof of parentage, including a birth certificate
Certified or official copy of a birth certificate issued by the entity authorized to issue the birth certificate (parent)
An order issued by a court of law
Written communication from a county welfare/probation department certifying foster care placement
Copy of a driver's license, motor vehicle administration ID, or any other government-issued identification (child)
Copy of a driver's license, motor vehicle administration ID, or any other government-issued identification (parent)
A lawfully executed and valid power of attorney
Social Security number or a copy of a Social Security card (child)
Social Security number or a copy of a Social Security card (parent)

authority.notes: Page requires one piece of documentation proving sufficient proof of authority. The birth certificate listed here is the same document as birth_child, which also satisfies childId.

parentId.notes: Page requires 'sufficient proof of identification' for the parent/guardian. Any one of these satisfies the requirement.

address.notes: The page does not require a separate proof of address document for the protected consumer (minor) freeze request. Address proof is only mentioned as optional for a standard adult freeze by mail.

childId.notes: Page requires 'sufficient proof of identification' for the minor/dependent. Any one of these satisfies the requirement. birth_child is the same document listed under authority.
